Check: (1) security headers (HSTS pending SSL, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, CSP with frame-src comgate.eu per Comgate inline gate spec), (2) no info disclosure (server_tokens off), (3) rate limiting on /api/auth and /api/dev-chat, (4) body size bounds sane (20M ok for image upload but scope to /api/uploadthing only if possible), (5) proxy header sanitization — no client X-Forwarded-* passthrough, (6) TLS config hardening checklist ready for when certbot runs. Deliverable: findings list + concrete diff suggestions in docs/migration/nginx/.
